scripts.minify:dist: npx terser dist/static/app.js -c -m -o dist/static/app.js && npx terser dist/static/features.js -c -m -o dist/static/features.js && npx terser dist/static/scaffolding.js -c -m -o dist/static/scaffolding.js && npx terser dist/static/study-materials.js -c -m -o dist/static/study-materials.js && npx cleancss -o dist/static/styles.css dist/static/styles.css
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name civics2026
